text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 33 

BILL_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Bill Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: A data element corresponding with UB-04 form locator FL4 that classifies the claim as to the type of 
facility (second digit), type of care (third digit) and the billing record’s sequence in the episode of care 
(fourth digit). (The first digit is always zero.) 

SHORT NAME: BILL_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: BILL_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR
